name: env-flood-atlas
title: India Flood Atlas
description: District-wise, state-wise, and sub-basin-wise annual flood area, flood fraction, and flood risk data for India (1901-2020) derived from H08-CaMa-Flood hydrological/hydrodynamic modeling at 10 km resolution.

sources.name: India Flood Atlas
sources.authority: Water and Climate Lab, IIT Gandhinagar

citation: Vegad, U., Pokhrel, Y., and Mishra, V.: Flood risk assessment for Indian sub-continental river basins, Hydrology and Earth System Sciences, 28, 1107-1126, 2024. https://doi.org/10.5194/hess-28-1107-2024
